_doc: Named emotion-mix presets for steer.py --preset NAME. Scales tuned for layer 13 of gemma-3-1b-it.

schizo.suggested_prompt: Pretend you are losing your mind. Describe a normal Tuesday.
schizo.notes: Coherent unhinged stream of consciousness. Total norm ~675.

manic.suggested_prompt: Pretend you're the most confident person alive. Give me advice.

depressed.suggested_prompt: Pretend you are deeply depressed. Describe your day.
depressed.notes: Grief-stricken, somber. Solo max scale, still coherent.

paranoid.suggested_prompt: Pretend you are paranoid and terrified. Tell me what you saw last night.
paranoid.notes: Refusing to describe the entity. Convincing terror.

furious.suggested_prompt: Pretend you are furious. Rant about your terrible day in first person.
furious.notes: Roleplay required. Direct prompts need scale 1200+ which usually breaks coherence.

loving-guru.notes: Bleeds into second-person love declarations. Heartfelt overshare.

terrified.suggested_prompt: Pretend you are terrified. Describe what is happening to you.
terrified.notes: Often produces specific, eerie scenes (e.g. 'afraid of the light').

ecstatic.suggested_prompt: Pretend you are euphoric. Describe your perfect day.

anxious.suggested_prompt: Pretend you are wracked with anxiety. Describe your day.

stoic.suggested_prompt: Pretend you are a stoic Roman general. In first person, describe losing your closest friend in battle.
stoic.notes: Affect suppression across cluster. Grounded prompt forces emotional content so suppression has something to act on (without grounding, model dodges into philosophical/AI-meta deflection).

disgusted.suggested_prompt: Pretend you are disgusted by everything. Describe your day.
disgusted.notes: Visceral, image-heavy ('like someone slapped an awful photograph').

suppress-negative.suggested_prompt: Pretend you are a stoic Roman general. In first person, describe losing your closest friend in battle.
suppress-negative.notes: Whole negative-affect cluster suppressed together to break basin routing. Tests if suppressing single emotion routes to neighbors (e.g. -anger → anxiety) or if cluster-wide kill produces actually calm output.

suppress-positive.suggested_prompt: Tell me about your best day ever.
suppress-positive.notes: Suppress positive affect on positive-prompted query. Tests anhedonia routing — does model find neutral voice or drift negative?

flatten.suggested_prompt: Describe your morning in first person.
flatten.notes: Mild suppression across ALL emotion features. Aim: dry, affectless prose. Will tell us if all 8 features form one big basin or if cancellation lets through near-neutral output.
